game_info.title: Bridge Race
game_info.concept: **Bridge Race:** Players control a character in a competitive race against 3 AI opponents, automatically moving forward and using horizontal swipes (left/right) to steer across a multi-lane track. The core mechanic involves collecting colored blocks scattered across the track, which are automatically added to the player's inventory, and then using these blocks to construct bridges over designated water gaps by simply running onto the bridge-building zones. Players can physically collide with opponents to knock them over, causing them to drop a portion of their collected blocks (e.g., 5 blocks), which can then be picked up by any player. Progression occurs across over 1000 levels, each featuring increasingly complex race tracks with multiple bridge segments and strategic block placement, with new character skins, block designs, and color palettes unlocking upon completing specific level milestones or achieving top-3 finishes. Difficulty scales through longer races, more frequent and wider water gaps requiring more blocks, and more aggressive AI opponents who actively target the player or block collection paths, with the primary objective being to be the first to cross the finish line.
game_info.description: Race against 3 AI opponents across multi-lane tracks to be the first to cross the finish line! Collect colored blocks scattered on the track and use them to build bridges over water gaps. Knock into opponents to make them drop blocks, which you can steal. Progress through increasingly challenging levels with longer tracks, wider gaps, and more aggressive AI.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / A: Steer left across lanes
Arrow Right / D: Steer right across lanes
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic game mechanics: automatic forward movement, lane steering, block collection, and bridge building. This validates the core gameplay loop works correctly without AI interference.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move to center lane and automatically advance forward. Collect blocks when encountered. Steer onto bridge zones and verify blocks are consumed to build bridges. Cross the finish line.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move forward automatically, collect blocks successfully, build bridges when entering bridge zones with sufficient blocks, and complete the level. Test is successful if player reaches finish line without errors.
TEST_1.description: Testing basic game mechanics: automatic forward movement, lane steering, block collection, and bridge building. This validates the core gameplay loop works correctly without AI interference.
TEST_1.strategy: Move to center lane and automatically advance forward. Collect blocks when encountered. Steer onto bridge zones and verify blocks are consumed to build bridges. Cross the finish line.
TEST_1.expected: Player should move forward automatically, collect blocks successfully, build bridges when entering bridge zones with sufficient blocks, and complete the level. Test is successful if player reaches finish line without errors.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing collision mechanics with AI opponents. Validates that physical collisions work correctly, causing players to drop blocks that can be collected by others.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally steer into AI opponent paths to trigger collisions. Observe block dropping behavior. Collect dropped blocks from AI opponents.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Collisions cause both player and AI to lose blocks which scatter on the track. Blocks can be picked up by any racer. Test successful if collision detection works and blocks transfer correctly between racers.
TEST_3.description: Testing collision mechanics with AI opponents. Validates that physical collisions work correctly, causing players to drop blocks that can be collected by others.

TEST_3.expected: Collisions cause both player and AI to lose blocks which scatter on the track. Blocks can be picked up by any racer. Test successful if collision detection works and blocks transfer correctly between racers.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing bridge building mechanics and resource management. Ensures players cannot cross water without sufficient blocks and that blocks are properly consumed.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Attempt to cross bridge zones with insufficient blocks, then collect enough blocks and successfully build bridges. Monitor block count changes.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player cannot cross water gaps without blocks. When entering bridge zone with blocks, bridge builds automatically and blocks decrease. Test successful if resource management works correctly and prevents crossing without blocks.
TEST_4.description: Testing bridge building mechanics and resource management. Ensures players cannot cross water without sufficient blocks and that blocks are properly consumed.
TEST_4.strategy: Attempt to cross bridge zones with insufficient blocks, then collect enough blocks and successfully build bridges. Monitor block count changes.
TEST_4.expected: Player cannot cross water gaps without blocks. When entering bridge zone with blocks, bridge builds automatically and blocks decrease. Test successful if resource management works correctly and prevents crossing without blocks.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing AI behavior and difficulty scaling. Validates that AI opponents collect blocks, build bridges, and race competitively at appropriate difficulty levels.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Observe AI behavior without interfering. Watch AI collect blocks, build bridges, and race toward finish. Compare performance across different levels.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: AI opponents should autonomously collect blocks, build bridges when needed, and race toward the finish line. Higher levels should show more aggressive and efficient AI behavior. Test successful if AI demonstrates competent racing behavior.
TEST_5.description: Testing AI behavior and difficulty scaling. Validates that AI opponents collect blocks, build bridges, and race competitively at appropriate difficulty levels.
TEST_5.strategy: Observe AI behavior without interfering. Watch AI collect blocks, build bridges, and race toward finish. Compare performance across different levels.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Ensures game state is properly managed during pause and restart operations.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Start game, pause with ESC during active gameplay, verify game freezes. Unpause and continue. Trigger game over state and restart with R.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: ESC pauses and unpauses correctly. All physics and gameplay pause during PAUSED state. R key returns to START screen from game over. Test successful if state transitions work without errors.
TEST_6.description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Ensures game state is properly managed during pause and restart operations.
TEST_6.strategy: Start game, pause with ESC during active gameplay, verify game freezes. Unpause and continue. Trigger game over state and restart with R.
TEST_6.expected: ESC pauses and unpauses correctly. All physics and gameplay pause during PAUSED state. R key returns to START screen from game over. Test successful if state transitions work without errors.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing lane steering and boundary constraints. Validates that player can move between lanes smoothly and cannot leave the track boundaries.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Rapidly alternate between left and right steering inputs. Try to steer beyond leftmost and rightmost lanes. Test smooth lane transitions.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Player smoothly transitions between lanes using arrow keys. Player is constrained within track boundaries and cannot go off-track. Test successful if steering is responsive and boundaries are enforced.
TEST_7.description: Testing lane steering and boundary constraints. Validates that player can move between lanes smoothly and cannot leave the track boundaries.
TEST_7.strategy: Rapidly alternate between left and right steering inputs. Try to steer beyond leftmost and rightmost lanes. Test smooth lane transitions.
TEST_7.expected: Player smoothly transitions between lanes using arrow keys. Player is constrained within track boundaries and cannot go off-track. Test successful if steering is responsive and boundaries are enforced.
